channel.title: No-Code on Kaoto | Free and Open Source Integration Editor for Apache Camel
channel.description: Recent content in No-Code on Kaoto | Free and Open Source Integration Editor for Apache Camel

item.title: Kaoto Catalog Overview
item.description: In the following video you can get an overview of the Kaoto catalog which provides you a collection of all supported Camel components, processors and Kamelets.

item.title: Rapid Prototyping with Camel JBang and Kaoto
item.description: On the following video we can see how to run your integration using Camel JBang dev mode.
